modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be distracting grammar usage and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need to change the default calendar on my iPhone.

full_description_text:  
I’m trying to set a different calendar as the default on my iPhone. It’s not working out, and I’m not sure what to do next. I just want to make sure my iCloud Calendar is the one that shows up by default.
short_description: Need to change the default calendar on my iPhone.
description: I’m trying to set a different calendar as the default on my iPhone. It’s not working out, and I’m not sure what to do next. I just want to make sure my iCloud Calendar is the one that shows up by default.
